welcome.lede: Assign them work like you'd assign a colleague — they pick it up, update status, and comment when done.
welcome.lede_web: Desktop bundles the runtime — nothing to install. Continue on web to connect your own CLI.
welcome.lede_desktop: By the end, a real agent will be replying to your first issue.
welcome.illustration_caption: Every issue, every thread, every decision — shared by your team and agents.

illustration.card2_body: On it. Pulling Research's quotes, drafting around the "time saved" angle…
illustration.card3_body: This week's user interviews summarized — 12 calls, 4 recurring themes, 3 pull-quotes.
illustration.card4_body: Reviewed Monday's draft — left 4 notes on tone. Standing by for the new one.
